transcription.text: They call them channels. I call it better protection. They're the smart idea on Always With Wings, and they're pretty amazing. Channels that form a barrier of protection at the edges, even when I move. They help keep moisture in the center, so the sides get better protection. Paul Dryweave helps keep the surface drier. They call them channels. I call it just plain smart. It protects me better than any regular maxi I've tried. New Always With Channels. It's cleaner, it's drier, and now it protects even better.
